laws.title: Connecticut Minimum Wage — $16.35/hr (2025)
laws.summary: Connecticut's minimum wage increased to $16.35/hour effective January 1, 2025, with further increases indexed to CPI going forward. Tipped employees: hotel/restaurant service employees must be paid at least $8.23/hr (tip credit applies).
compliance_actions: Ensure all Connecticut employees earn at least $16.35/hr
Update payroll for tipped employees — verify tip credit is properly applied
Post the Connecticut minimum wage poster at CT worksites

laws.title: Connecticut Paid Family & Medical Leave — Employee Contributions
laws.summary: Connecticut's Paid Family and Medical Leave (PFML) provides up to 12 weeks of paid leave for qualifying reasons. Employees contribute 0.5% of wages (up to the Social Security wage base). Benefits began January 2022. Employers must register with CT Paid Leave Authority and withhold employee contributions. Self-funded exemptions are possible with approval.
compliance_actions: Ensure you are registered with the CT Paid Leave Authority
Deduct the 0.5% employee contribution from all CT employee wages
Update employee handbook with CT PFML information
Post the CT Paid Leave notice at all Connecticut worksites
Train HR on how CT PFML coordinates with FMLA and CT sick leave
